record.field: Barcode must be at least 8 digits and contain only digits. Enable the checksum check once your barcode data is cleaner — a strict GTIN check digit applied to bad data will collapse the score overnight.
Internal reference (SKU) must be at least 2 characters. Set a regex to enforce a house format if you have one.
Lot or batch number must be at least 3 characters. Tighten with a regex once your supplier batch format stabilises.
